title: Kills Grant Strength
description: Killing a player gives one level of strength permanently
body:
Killing a player grants the Strength 1 effect permanently\
Killing another player grants strength 2\
And again for strength 3

Dying to a player will make you lose one level of strength\
if you dont have any strength levels and die, you get weakness 1

`/trigger ResetStrengthLevels` will reset everyone back to 0 strength levels.

- You must be in creative to use that command
